markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Relay Financial and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, review artifacts, and align on next steps for their collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX updated artifacts and conducted initial keyword research, creating a content calendar with 39 blog ideas for Relay's review](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Relay has developed ThreadGPT, an internal tool for compliance reviews, which may offer collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [GrowthX is working on integrating compliance reviews into their Atlas workflow to streamline content production](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Imagery and CMS access discussions highlighted the need for further coordination between Relay's design team and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Artifact Updates

  - [GrowthX updated artifacts based on Relay's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Initial keyword research completed, resulting in 39 blog ideas for review](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Relay to provide additional feedback on content strategy, particularly regarding product-focused clusters](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [GrowthX aims to have 5-10 topics approved initially to begin content production](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)

### Content Calendar and Management

  - [GrowthX uses Airtable as the "single source of truth" for content production](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Relay maintains an internal content calendar in Notion to avoid topic overlap](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [No set publishing schedule for Relay due to compliance review limitations](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up automation in Airtable for content review notifications](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)

### Imagery and Design Collaboration

  - [GrowthX offers in-house designer to create featured images for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Relay to provide brand guidelines and examples for GrowthX's designer to work from](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [GrowthX to generate image examples for Relay's approval before implementing in the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)

### CMS Access and Publishing Process

  - [Awaiting final approval for GrowthX's access to Relay's content stack](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [GrowthX will stage content, with Relay team handling final publishing](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Dave and Katie from Relay will be responsible for content review](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)

### Analytics and Reporting

  - [GrowthX to set up Scrunch for AI visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Looker dashboard to be implemented, connecting Google Search Console and GA4 data](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Dashboard will track organic traffic performance, content clusters, and LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)

### Compliance and Review Process

  - [Relay has developed ThreadGPT for internal compliance reviews](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [GrowthX exploring ways to integrate compliance reviews into their Atlas workflow](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Potential for collaboration on improving compliance review tools](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Relay to review and approve initial blog topics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Relay to share internal content calendar to avoid topic overlap](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Relay's design team to provide brand guidelines and stock image resources](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up Scrunch and Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Relay to follow up on CMS access approval](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [GrowthX to send Airtable access link to Relay team](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Relay to consider extracting common sales call questions for use as AI prompts](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Next weekly sync scheduled for the following week](https://fathom.video/share/29QkfnxKHzmACN-vbH9vvc68mBhscuPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
